evidence.snippet:
Sagetech’s micro transponders deliver unmatched reliability with advanced performance in one small high-powered package.
![](data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAIAAAAAAAP///yH5BAEAAAAALAAAAAABAAEAAAIBRAA7)

Sagetech’s next-gen MX12B miniature transponder is the only micro Mode 5 IFF transponder certified to the full DoD AIMS Mk XIIB specification. It packages Mode 5, Mode S, and complete ADS-B In and Out capability in a SWaP that is at least 93% smaller and 6 times lighter than traditional certified military Mode 5 IFF transponders.

items.notes: Core product line: miniature Mode S/C/IFF/ADS-B transponders for crewed and uncrewed aircraft worldwide.

evidence.snippet: We provide the most advanced certifiable, onboard detect and avoid (DAA) systems for crewed and uncrewed aircraft with our onboard, full power, low SWaP collision avoidance solution – all made possible with an onboard ACAS DAA computer.

### Xu: Fixed Wing Aircraft
**55lbs | >400 AGL
**Navigate BVLOS safely through all airspace with this certifiable, ACAS-based, all-in-one detect and avoid system in a single low-SWaP package including our integrated cooperative traffic interrogator, plug-n-play compatible with common non-cooperative sensors.

items.notes: ACAS-based Detect and Avoid systems (Xu, sXu, Xr) with onboard DAA computer and SafeMission+ software provide collision avoidance advisories interfacing with autopilots.

evidence.snippet:
317 W Steuben Street
Bingen, WA 98605

We help OEMs, and government agencies all around the world develop their solutions for successful airspace integration.
Whether your project is in pre-development, or further along in the certification process, our team of experts can help guide you to success.
Every day, we collaborate with the world’s most advanced UAV manufacturers to develop solutions for emerging challenges.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Sells certified transponder and DAA/collision-avoidance subsystems to UAS OEMs and government programs; does not manufacture complete airframes.

Sagetech’s FAA-certified next-gen MXS miniature transponder provides Modes A, C, S and 1090 MHz ADS-B in/out for worldwide compliance of your crewed or uncrewed system.

items.name: XPG Mode S Legacy Transponder
items.product_type: Miniature Mode S ADS-B Out transponder with integrated GPS

evidence.snippet:
### XPG Mode S Legacy Transponder
Sagetech XPG transponders deliver Modes A, C, and S, ADS-B Out, plus integrated GPS functionality in a tiny, all-in-one solution.

### XPC Mode C Legacy Transponder
When you need ultra-reliable performance at a cost-effective price, the XPC transponder delivers. This unit offers a host of advanced features packaged in a tiny SWaP footprint.

items.name: ACAS sXu
items.product_type: All-in-one detect-and-avoid system for small UAS <55lbs flying <400ft AGL

evidence.snippet:
### sXu: Small, Uncrewed Aircraft
**<55lbs | <400 AGL
**Protect your investment and fly even the smallest aircraft BVLOS with Sagtech’s all-in-one ACAS sXu system. Low SWaP and integrated with autopilots and non-cooperative sensors. Dual-band ADS-B receiver for cooperative traffic. This product services fixed and rotary wing small UAS.
